  groups:
  - name: -names-starting-with-dash
  - name: all-names-longer-than-256-characters--------------------------------------
      -------------------------------------------------------------------------- --------------------------------------------------------------------------
      --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  - name: names-with-diakritics-žluťoučký-kůň
  - name: names with spaces
  - name: gid-0
  users: null
